message:
fix(stream): NOGROUP error format, XSETID persistence, bitmap error expectations

- Standardize all NOGROUP errors to Redis format: "No such consumer group
  '{group}' for key name '{key}'" (was per-command format)
- Implement XSETID state: add stream_last_ids HashMap to Store so XSETID
  affects XADD auto-ID generation (was no-op)
- Clean up stream_last_ids alongside stream_groups on key deletion/rename/flush
- Fix bitmap conformance expectations to match Redis-accurate error messages
  for SETBIT/GETBIT (bit offset/bit value errors)
- Fix XAUTOCLAIM cursor fixture and XSETID nonexistent stream expectation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
